cards.title: High-End Drilling Rig Rental (ZJ90DB)
cards.summary: We offer high-end drilling rig rentals suitable for ultra-deep well operations.

cards.title: Specialized Chassis for Oil Fields (China National Heavy Duty Truck Group Joint Research)
cards.summary: r 8x6 fracturing truck chassis, sand-mixing truck chassis, and 58-ton coiled tubing truck chassis. These products fully replace imported MAN and Mercedes-Benz chassis, thereby reducing overall costs.

cards.title: Power System Turnkey Services
cards.summary: Providing one-stop power system solutions for drilling rigs.

cards.title: Support for the PEMEX Project in Mexico
cards.summary: Helped Great Wall Drilling secure a contract with Mexico’s national oil company, leasing three 3,000-horsepower drilling rigs, and swiftly responding to the asset-light strategy.

cards.title: Customized Diesel Generator Sets
cards.summary: We have established a strategic partnership with Jichai Machinery to develop customized, high-performance generator sets and jointly promote their application in the oil and petrochemical industries.

cards.title: HSE Comprehensive Risk Management
cards.summary: 15-minute response time, 24/7 online support. We provide full-scenario risk assessments, real-time monitoring, and customized technical training.

bottomSection.bottomTitle: With an industry-leading supply chain system
bottomSection.bottomSubtitle: Whether in the deserts of the Tarim Basin or the oil fields of Mexico, we can provide you with precise, customized services.
